assertions.title: CASH hooks and lib ported, no import errors, VITE config usage

commands.command: python3 scope/env artifact scan for apps/trading/src/cash

commands.note: Exit code 1 is expected for no matches

commands.command: pnpm --filter @cash/trading exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution node --module esnext --target ESNext --jsx react-jsx --esModuleInterop --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --resolveJsonModule --lib DOM,DOM.Iterable,ESNext --types vite/client,node /Users/maxmohammadi/cash-orderbook/apps/trading/src/cash/index.ts

steps.expected: 15 hooks and 6 lib files exist per contract

steps.action: Verify env var conventions in cash port
steps.expected: VITE_* used in config and no NEXT_PUBLIC_* in cash files
steps.observed: VITE_API_URL/VITE_WS_URL/VITE_APTOS_NETWORK/VITE_CONTRACT_ADDRESS present in config; NEXT_PUBLIC_* had no matches

steps.action: TypeScript compile/type check of cash entrypoint imports
steps.observed: Command completed with EXIT_CODE=0 and no diagnostics

assertions.issues: Contract requires 15 hooks; scan found 14 hook files under apps/trading/src/cash/hooks, so assertion criteria are not fully met.

summary: INT-001 failed: VITE/NEXT_PUBLIC checks and targeted cash typecheck passed, but hook artifact count is 14 instead of the required 15.
